title: The Poko Party — Afrobeat & African Rhythms
location: District Atlanta, 35 Woodward Way SE, Atlanta 30313
description: High-energy Afrobeat party with an all-female DJ lineup. Known for its electric atmosphere and culture-celebrating crowd. Great for couples who love to dance and feel the rhythm of the continent.

title: Friday Jazz — High Museum of Art
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta 30309
description: Live jazz in one of Atlanta's most iconic art spaces. Bring your honey, grab a cocktail, and let the music set the mood. Perfect sophisticated date night with art and sound.

title: ATL BACHATuesdays — Latin Dance Social
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta GA 30324
description: Atlanta's best weekly bachata and salsa social. All levels welcome with a free beginner lesson. Couples can learn a new dance together or show off their moves. Excellent energy every week.

title: Salsa ATL's Tropical Elegance — Saturday Latin Night
location: Atlanta area venues
description: Elegant tropical-themed Latin dance night featuring salsa, bachata, and merengue. Dress to impress, dance the night away. A glamorous date-night option.

title: Free Salsa & Bachata Lessons — El Super Pan BatteryATL
location: El Super Pan, Battery ATL, 2644 Cobb Pkwy SE, Smyrna 30080
description: Free salsa and bachata dance lessons at El Super Pan followed by open dancing. Caribbean vibes, great food, and no cover charge. Fun low-key date idea.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend — Reggae, Afrobeat & Soca
location: Atlanta area venue (TBA)
description: 100% Reggae, Afrobeat & Soca memorial weekend celebration. Electric island vibes all night long. Perfect for couples who want to dance to Caribbean rhythms in a high-energy crowd.

title: Atlanta Caribbean Carnival — Parade of Bands
location: Peachtree Street → Rodney Cook Sr. Park, Vine City, Atlanta
price: Free to watch; festival entry varies
description: The signature Caribbean event of the year. Vibrant street parade with elaborate feather costumes, soca trucks, dancers, and DJs. Festival village has live music, Caribbean food, and cultural showcases. A must-see experience.

title: J'ouvert — Caribbean Carnival Opening
location: Underground Atlanta, Downtown Atlanta
description: Dawn-inspired street celebration kicking off carnival weekend. Paint, powder, soca music, and high energy. Pre-carnival warmup perfect for adventurous couples.

title: EPIC FEST Atlanta Carnival — 6 Events 6 Themes
location: Atlanta area venue
description: Six themes, six events, one epic weekend. Part of Atlanta's Caribbean carnival season — high-energy parties, live music, and cultural celebrations. Great for couples who love festival culture.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase — Laughing Skull Lounge
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 878 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta 30309
description: Laugh together at one of Atlanta's top comedy venues. Featuring the best local and touring stand-up comedians. Perfect low-pressure date night — guaranteed laughs.

title: Open Mic Night — Laughing Skull Lounge
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 878 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta 30309
description: Fun open mic comedy night at Atlanta's premier comedy club. You never know what you'll see — the spontaneity makes it a great adventurous date night.

title: Guy'z Nite Out Comedy Experience — Uptown Comedy Corner
location: Uptown Comedy Corner, 4730 Frontage Rd, Forest Park, GA
description: Atlanta's original comedy club delivers a fun night of stand-up. Low-key, intimate, and genuinely funny. Great for couples looking for a relaxed, entertaining evening.

title: 'Returns' Exhibition — Spruill Gallery
location: Spruill Gallery, 4683 Buford Hwy NE, Dunwoody, GA
description: Group exhibition featuring Hamidullah exploring reimagined narratives through contemporary art. Thought-provoking and peaceful setting — great for couples who appreciate meaningful art conversations.

title: Once the Ocean Floor — Haines Gallery
location: Haines Gallery, Atlanta
description: Photography group exhibition featuring John Chiara, Linda Connor, David Maisel, and Meghann Riepenhoff. Works across a range of photographic processes exploring the ocean floor theme. Beautiful and contemplative.

title: Draw, Paint & Connect — Stormwater Studios
location: Stormwater Studios, Atlanta
description: About Face Group art session encouraging visitors to draw, paint, and connect. A creative, interactive gallery experience. Great for couples who want to express their artistic side together.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language — Atlanta Contemporary
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 535 Means St NW, Atlanta 30318
description: Exhibition by Bethany Collins and February James exploring language, identity, and embodiment. Free admission and genuinely fascinating — a great conversation-starter for couples.

title: Plant-Based Date Night Cooking Class — Cozymeal
location: Atlanta area, Various Chefs
description: A romantic 2.5-hour cooking class focused on plant-based cuisine. Cook together, eat together, learn together. All-inclusive experience — a unique and delicious date idea.

title: Vegan & Friends — Weekly Vegan Meet-Up
location: Varies (Atlanta area)
description: Atlanta's weekly vegan movement — a vibrant community meet-up celebrating plant-based living. Great for couples interested in vegetarian cuisine, meeting like-minded people, and having a fun casual evening.

title: Green Market — Piedmont Park Farmers Market
location: Piedmont Park, Atlanta 30309
description: Atlanta's original farmers market with 20+ years running. Fresh local produce, artisan goods, live music buskers. Grab breakfast, stroll the park, and soak in the local scene. Classic free date morning.

title: Cocktails in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta 30309
description: After-hours garden party with specialty cocktails, live music throughout the garden, exhibitions lit up at night, and food from Longleaf Restaurant. Magical and romantic atmosphere perfect for couples.

title: Brew at the Zoo — Zoo Atlanta
time: VIP early entry 4:30 PM; Main event 5:30–9:00 PM
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta 30315
description: Adults-only evening at the zoo with craft brews, live music, animal encounters, and food trucks. Unique date night combining wildlife and craft beverages. Great value and unforgettable.

title: Love on the Lake! — Painting with a Twist
location: Painting with a Twist, Kennesaw (Atlanta area)
description: Couples painting class with a beautiful lake theme on a 16x20 canvas. BYOB, instructor-guided, no experience needed. A creative, romantic way to spend a Sunday evening together.
